flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Western Iowa Tech Community College rose 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.7k → $11.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Western Iowa Tech Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Western Iowa Tech Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Western Iowa Tech Community College rose 52% between 2006 and 2009 (21.6% → 32.9%).
